summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; no shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. No merge, fix, low-signal close, or instant close actions are planned. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent backlog items for normal maintainer review; already-closed PRs are skipped; unhydrated listed PRs need a refreshed preflight before classification.
